contracts.limits: 1,400 linear feet

contracts.project: 2026 Annual Drainage Maintenance Design
contracts.limits: Multiple locations throughout City of Celina
contracts.notes: Design services for annual drainage maintenance improvements at three locations (Redbud Street & Missouri Street, Railroad Corridor Beech to Elm, and Old Celina Park Area) including culvert replacement, ditch regrading, and erosion control to reduce localized flooding and ponding.

contracts.project: Annual Drainage Maintenance
contracts.notes: Work authorization for design services related to annual drainage maintenance in the City of Celina.

contracts.project: Ousley Park and S. Arkansas Street Improvements
contracts.limits: Approximately 30 acres; 12 months design + 12-18 months construction administration
contracts.notes: Architectural, landscape architecture, and engineering design services for Ousley Park (30 acres) and S. Arkansas Street improvements, including community playground, trails, pickleball courts, sports facilities, dog park, Bobcat Stadium renovations, and street improvements with on-street parking and utilities.

contracts.project: Parks Administration Building - Fire Lane Design
contracts.notes: Design services for fire lane to serve Parks Administration Building, including construction documents, site plans, details, specifications, and coordination with utility relocation and landscape design.
